case_title: MARTIN, DEMETRIUS A. VS DAVEY, PETER J.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-08-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1500.
